name: Yunnan Steamed Pot Chicken #2
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the chicken in a pot (or wok) full of boiling water for 3 minutes.
2. Rinse the chicken in cold water.
3. Set a steaming rack in your wok and fill the wok with water to just below the rack.
4. Place the chicken on the casserole.
5. Place the breasts in the center and cover with the slower cooking dark meat parts.
6. Arrange the ginger slices all over the chicken.
7. Trim the green onions and cut into 2-inch pieces, then arrange them over the chicken.
8. Pour in the wine and broth.
9. Sprinkle salt over everything.
10. Place the casserole on the rack in the wok and cover with the dome lid.
11. Steam for about an hour, checking every 20 minutes to ensure the water does not boil dry.
